original_thesis: The 'where to push' stack. Pareto identifies the vital few; power laws reveal disproportionate returns; leverage points show where small interventions move the whole system; understanding motivations reveals why people respond.
what_this_stack_defeats: Uniform effort distribution, ignoring high-leverage interventions
notes: Thesis mentions understanding-motivations which isn't a member; actual members include optimization-theory and prioritization instead. Minor drift. The core 'disproportionate impact' thesis is accurate. Prerequisite chain systems-thinking → leverage-points is embedded.
